steps: Define random variables for each step
Calculate mean and variance of single step
Define Liz's position after n steps
Calculate probability limit for part a
question_text:
Liz is standing on the real number line at position 0 . She rolls a die repeatedly. If the roll is 1 or 2 , she takes one step to the right (in the positive direction). If the roll is $3,4,5$ or 6 , she takes two steps to the right. Let $X_{n}$ be Liz's position after $n$ flips of the coin.
Part (a): Find $\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} P(X_{n}>1.6 n)$.
